attributes.action: cancel all interest on student loans
attributes.additional_details: My students are weighed down by the interest payments. They will pay the debt from original student loan but need the crippling interest to be quashed.
attributes.background: Students currently owe more in interest than the original student loan and this debt effects their ability to get a mortgage.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for the same action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756832
